title: Reject link-layer encrypted payloads consistently
description: C currently AES-encrypts E=1 frames and cannot receive its own unsigned encrypted output; Python/Rust reject encrypted frames and the draft treats E as opaque upper-layer encryption. Make all link boundaries reject E=1 until a coordinated encryption design exists, update C tests, and remove contradictory C AES behavior from the active path.
close_reason: Implemented consistent E=1 rejection at C frame parse/write, TX, and RX boundaries; removed link AES-CCM path and updated tests/docs. Host C tests pass; native_sim is Linux-only on this macOS host.
